text:
Created attachment 155484
Proposed patch (since 381441 revision)

Patch to update devel/tig port from 2.1 to 2.1.1 version.

Look following links for changes:
http://jonas.nitro.dk/tig/NEWS.html#_tig_2_1_1
https://github.com/jonas/tig/compare/tig-2.1...tig-2.1.1

Added upstream patch to "fix crash due to out-of-bounds array access":
https://github.com/jonas/tig/commit/718c6e9
